creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
You probably want something like this?

%%%
 LDFLAGS+=      -fuse-ld=bfd
 BINARY_ALIAS+= ld=${LD}
 .  if !defined(USE_BINUTILS)
-.    if exists(/usr/bin/ld.bfd)
+.    if exists(/usr/bin/ld.bfd) && (${ARCH} != powerpc64 || ${OSVERSION} < 1300038)
 LD=    /usr/bin/ld.bfd
 CONFIGURE_ENV+=        LD=${LD}
 MAKE_ENV+=     LD=${LD}
%%%
